title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three years that Bamboo Memory and I have
spent passionately chasing after our dreams are
finally coming to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, a new dream is already burning brightly
deep within her heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As long as that passion stays ablaze, her days of
taking on new challenges will never end.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Goooood morning!

text_block_list.name: School-Bound Student A
text_block_list.text: Good morning!

text_block_list.name: School-Bound Student B
text_block_list.text: Morning, Bamboo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Everything's in order and everyone's looking
cheerful!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
Um, excuse me! I just wanted to say good
morning, Bamboo Memory!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
What a lovely greeting! Good morning to you
too! Have a productive day!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: Th-thanks! I'll try to!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
Um... actually. Could I talk to you about
something?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, of course! What's the matter? Is someone
breaking a rule?!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: Um... Well...

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: I... I'd like to join the disciplinary committee!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! So you've realized the importance of
maintaining order?! In that case, you'd be more
than welcome!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's part of it, of course... but actually... I
really look up to you, Bamboo!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
I get so inspired watching your races! It's like... my
heart catches fire!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
I want to run just like you... I want to be as cool as
you!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
So I thought if I joined the disciplinary
committee, I could get to know you!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
One day, when I make my debut and get really
strong, I want to race you!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: That's my dream!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That...

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: ...Yes?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's an awesome dream!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...And that's what happened! I was so moved!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I mean, her dream is to race me!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I think I'm gonna cry just thinking about it! It's
like, WHOOOA!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Right?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And it's all thanks to you always being there for
me and supporting my dreams!
choice_data_list: It's because you shared them with me.
It's because you shared them with me.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
For the sake of her dreams and my own as well,
I'm going to become the strongest Umamusume
ever!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Keep pushing me hard, okay? I'm counting on ya!
